title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: City Bus Tour
questions.text: The city bus tour lasts ninety minutes and includes a stop at the old castle. Tickets bought online are cheaper, but they must be printed before you arrive at the bus station.
questions.question: What does the advert say?

options.C: Online tickets need to be printed first.
options.A: The tour finishes before reaching the castle.
options.B: Tickets cost less at the bus station.

questions.explanation: Online tickets are cheaper but must be printed before arrival.

questions.heading: Message from Josh to Emma
questions.text: Emma, the café where we usually study is too noisy today. I’m going to the library instead. I’ll sit near the computers, so come there when you finish your piano lesson.
questions.question: Why is Josh texting Emma?

options.A: To tell her about a change of meeting place.
options.B: To say he cannot study with her today.
options.C: To ask her to stop playing piano.

questions.explanation: Josh is moving the study meeting from the café to the library.

questions.heading: Park Visitors
questions.text: The bridge over the lake is closed this week for repairs. Visitors can still reach the playground by following the signs through the rose garden. This route takes five minutes longer.
questions.question: What does the notice explain?

options.B: Visitors can use another route to the playground.
options.A: The playground is closed for bridge repairs.
options.C: The rose garden route is now shorter.

questions.explanation: Visitors can still reach the playground by another route.

questions.heading: From: Dad / Subject: Train tickets
questions.text: I bought your train tickets for Saturday, but I chose the return time you suggested, not the earlier one. Check the tickets tonight, and tell me quickly if I misunderstood your message.
questions.question: What does Dad want the reader to do?

options.C: Make sure the ticket time is correct.
options.A: Choose an earlier return train now.
options.B: Buy the Saturday train tickets again.

questions.explanation: Dad asks the reader to check whether he understood the return time correctly.

questions.heading: Homework Diary Check
questions.text: Tutors will check homework diaries on Friday morning. Please make sure your parents have signed this week’s page. Students without signatures will need to bring diaries again on Monday.
questions.question: What should students do before Friday?

options.A: Get a parent to sign their diary.
options.B: Give their diary to tutors on Monday.
options.C: Write extra homework in their diary.

questions.explanation: Students need their parents’ signatures by Friday morning.
